2606.20146.title: BIM-Edit: Benchmarking Large Language Models for IFC-Based Building Information Modeling
2606.20146.paper_summary: Large language models (LLMs) are increasingly applied to computer-aided design (CAD) to generate design artifacts from textual instructions. In engineering practice, this requires more than creating new geometry, models must also understand existing scenes, edit them correctly, and preserve semantics and relations. However, many CAD benchmarks focus on creating new models rather than editing existing ones, and mostly evaluate geometric correctness. We introduce BIM-Edit, a benchmark for evaluating LLMs on natural-language editing of Building Information Models (BIM) represented in the Industry Foundation Classes (IFC) format. BIM provides a challenging testbed because building models encode geometry together with semantic and relational structure. BIM-Edit contains 324 editing tasks spanning 11 realistic building models and 36 synthetic scenes. Tasks are expressed using three instruction categories - direct, spatial, and topological - covering both explicit and scene-grounded edits. We evaluate outputs along three dimensions: geometric accuracy, semantic validity, and topological consistency. Across evaluated LLMs, the best-performing model achieves only 49.5% average score across the three metrics, and no model fully solves more than 3.4% of tasks. These results demonstrate a substantial gap between current LLM capabilities and the requirements of structured engineering design workflows.
2606.20146.paper_summary_zh: 大型語言模型（LLMs）越來越多地應用於計算機輔助設計（CAD），以從文本指令生成設計產物。<lb/>在工程實踐中，這不僅需要創建新的幾何形狀，模型還必須理解現有場景，正確編輯它們，並保留語義和關係。<lb/>然而，許多CAD基準測試專注於創建新模型，而不是編輯現有模型，並且主要評估幾何正確性。<lb/>我們介紹了BIM-Edit，這是一個用於評估LLMs在自然語言編輯建築信息模型（BIM）方面的基準，這些模型以行業基礎類（IFC）格式表示。<lb/>BIM提供了一個具有挑戰性的測試平台，因為建築模型同時編碼幾何形狀以及語義和關係結構。<lb/>BIM-Edit包含324個編輯任務，涵蓋11個現實建築模型和36個合成場景。<lb/>任務使用三種類型的指令表達——直接、空間和拓撲——涵蓋了顯性和基於場景的編輯。<lb/>我們從三個維度評估輸出：幾何準確性、語義有效性和拓撲一致性。<lb/>在評估的LLMs中，表現最佳的模型在這三個指標上的平均得分僅為49.5%，而且沒有模型完全解決超過3.4%的任務。<lb/>這些結果顯示了當前LLM能力與結構化工程設計工作流程要求之間的顯著差距。
2606.20146.author: Bharathi Kannan Nithyanantham et.al.
2606.20146.authors: Bharathi Kannan Nithyanantham, Clemens Kujat, Tobias Sesterhenn, Stefan Telgmann, Jörn Plönnigs, Stefan Lüdtke, Christian Bartelt
